6 OR 13
7 OR 24

Applying to 01100101
Input
I 0 = 0
I 1 = 1
I 2 = 1
I 3 = 0
I 4 = 0
I 5 = 1
I 6 = 0
I 7 = 1
Output
0 C 0 = 1
1 C 1 = 1
2 C 2 = 1
3 C 3 = 1
4 C 4 = 1
5 C 5 = 1
6 OR 13 = OR(I 1,I 3) = OR(1,0) = 1
7 OR 24 = OR(I 2,I 4) = OR(1,0) = 1

\boxed{11111111}
